No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF CACV OF COLORADO, LLC'S Motion For Order Vacating Default Judgment And Dismissing Case Without Prejudice is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
